text: Revenue NSW. Use this form to give the name and address of the party who was in charge of the vehicle or vessel at the time of the offence(s). Note: You do not need to complete this form if you make your request online at nsw.gov.au and search 'nominate another driver'. Otherwise return by post to Revenue NSW, PO Box 786, Strawberry Hills NSW 2012.

label: Full Name of Party Completing this Form (on behalf of the organisation named on the fine)

text: Give notice that the party named below was responsible for the fine:

label: Surname of Party or Name of Organisation

text: I make this solemn declaration conscientiously believing the same to be true and by virtue of the provisions of the Oaths Act 1900. Note: A party who makes a false or misleading declaration is liable to a penalty of up to $5500.

Privacy Collection Notice. Your personal information is being collected by Revenue NSW, authorised by the Fines Act 1996. We collect your personal information to manage your fine. Revenue NSW takes the protection and privacy of your personal information seriously by handling personal information in a responsible manner and in accordance with the NSW Privacy Laws: Privacy and Personal Information Protection Act 1998 and Health Records and Information Privacy Act 2002. In managing your fine, your personal information may be disclosed to: Service NSW; Revenue NSW's contracted printing and document capture service providers; the authority who issued the fine including NSW Police, Local Councils and Transport for NSW; and the person you nominate (disclosure of your name only in this instance). We may also disclose your information to other bodies as permitted or required by law. Please go to www.revenue.nsw.gov.au/privacy for more information or to make a privacy complaint.
